title: Manufacturing Engineer - TVS Motor - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - TVS Motor - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, TVS Motor in Jaipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About TVS Motor:
TVS Motor is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TVS Motor!
